header.tagline: Building reliable systems for mission-driven organizations.

paragraphs: I'm motivated by work that improves access to essential services and strengthens the systems people rely on every day. I'm particularly interested in how technology can support better decision-making through high-quality data, reliable infrastructure, and thoughtfully designed tools — whether in healthcare, public services, non-profits, or other mission-driven spaces.
This portfolio showcases my journey, projects, and skills. Feel free to explore and get in touch if you'd like to collaborate!

items.name: LAPS Healthcare Data Pipeline
description: A production-grade healthcare data pipeline in Python and Selenium to ingest, clean, normalize, validate, and structure 100,000+ physician records and 6,500+ linked scheduling entities for longitudinal research and analytics.

jobs.company: Tulane University & Portland State Univeristy - Longitudinal Access to Physicians Study
responsibilities: Optimized a healthcare data pipeline from 3-10 minutes per record to under 1 second while scaling ingestion to 100,000 physician records and 6,500 linked scheduling entities.
Built production ETL pipelines in Python and Selenium to ingest, clean, validate, and structure healthcare data across multiple international platforms with locale-specific schemas.
Designed relational database schemas with embedded data quality checks, type validation, error handling and automated QA processes, ensuring reliable downstream analytics for longitudinal research.
Automated monitoring and pipeline diagnostics, improving  observability and operational stability while reducing manual intervention.
Collaborated with cross-institutional stakeholders to translate evolving research requirements into scalable technical solutions with clear documentation.
Built a CI/CD pre-diagnostic tool in ASP.NET Core and C# that analyzed build data to prevent common pipeline failures, improving release reliability.
Developed real-time subscription and notification features using Azure Functions and Cosmos DB, enabling automatic API change and approval alerts.
Optimized data access layer by migrating to RESTful services; transitioned legacy .NET components to Angular, improving performance and traceability.

Led custom framing operations for a high-end clientele over a decade, managing the full project lifecycle for 20+ concurrent projects while balancing client expectations, production schedules, quality standards, and delivery deadlines.

footer.tagline: Let's connect and build something amazing together!
